title: AhaPrompt - AI Prompts for Images, Video & Audio — Every Model, One Library
excerpt: Free, curated AI prompt library for images, video & audio. Copy-paste prompts for Nano Banana, Midjourney, Veo, Sora, Suno & more — find your aha moment.
content_html:
Image · Video · Audio — every model, one library

Free, curated prompts for AI image, video & music — tagged by model, tested by creators. Copy, paste, create.

Browse promptsShare a prompt

38 curated prompts20 models coveredFree forever

01Portraits, product shots, anime & concept art02Cinematic shots and ad-ready clips for Veo, Sora, Seedance & Kling03Songs, scores & voiceovers for Suno and ElevenLabs

How it works

Find a prompt that matches your idea, copy it, and create — in whatever tool you already use.

  1. 01

    Narrow the library by media type, model, or category — images, video, music, or voice.

  2. 02

    Every prompt is paste-ready, parameters included. One click puts it on your clipboard.

  3. 03

    Drop it into Google AI Studio, Sora, Suno — anywhere. Got a great result? Share it back.

Find your first prompt

Start from your project

From marketing visuals to short films to soundtracks — jump straight into the prompts that match your project.

01Professional headshots, character portraits, and stylized avatars with studio-grade lighting.02Fantasy worlds, game art, anime, and editorial illustration in every style.03Scroll-stopping images for campaigns, banners, and brand content.04Cinematic video prompts for Veo, Sora, Seedance, and Kling — trailers, ads, and story scenes.05E-commerce shots, packaging mockups, and product visuals that sell.06Full songs, background scores, and genre experiments for Suno and beyond.07Thumbnails, reels, and posts tuned for every platform and format.08Natural text-to-speech prompts for narration, podcast intros, and character voices.

Browse by style

Why AhaPrompt

One library that keeps up with the whole AI creative stack — so you don't have to.

01
Prompts for GPT Image 2, Nano Banana, Midjourney, Veo, Sora, Seedance, Suno, and more — each labeled with the model it was written for.

02
Images, video, and audio in one place. Filter by media type and jump straight to your craft.

03
Complete prompts, parameters included, on your clipboard in one click. Paste into any tool or API.

04
Editor-curated collections alongside community submissions — every prompt is reviewed before it goes live.

05
The full library in English, Chinese, Japanese, and Korean — copy in your language, create in any.

06
Browse, copy, and use every public prompt at no cost. Great prompts should be accessible to everyone.

Good to know

Everything you need to know about AhaPrompt and how to get the most out of the library.

content_html_zh:
图像 · 视频 · 音频 — 每个模型，一个库

免费、精心策划的 AI 图像、视频和音乐提示 — 按模型标记，由创作者测试。 复制、粘贴、创建。

浏览提示分享提示

38 个精选提示涵盖 20 个模型永久免费

01Portraits, product shots, anime & concept art02Cinematic shots and ad-ready clips for Veo, Sora, Seedance & Kling03Songs, scores & voiceovers for Suno and ElevenLabs

它是如何运作的

找到与您的想法相匹配的提示，复制它，然后使用您已经使用的任何工具进行创建。

  1. 01按媒体类型、模型或类别（图像、视频、音乐或语音）缩小库范围。
  2. 02每个提示均已准备好粘贴，包括参数。 单击一下即可将其添加到剪贴板。
  3. 03将其放入 Google AI Studio、Sora、Suno — 任何地方。 取得了很好的成绩吗？ 分享回来。

找到您的第一个提示

从你的项目开始

从营销视觉效果到短片再到配乐——直接跳到与您的项目相匹配的提示。

01专业头像、人物肖像和带有工作室级灯光的风格化头像。02各种风格的幻想世界、游戏艺术、动漫和编辑插图。03活动、横幅和品牌内容的滚动停止图像。04Veo、Sora、Seedance和Kling的电影视频提示——预告片、广告和故事场景。05电子商务镜头、包装模型和产品视觉效果出售。06Suno 及其他地区的完整歌曲、背景乐谱和流派实验。07针对每个平台和格式调整的缩略图、卷轴和帖子。08用于旁白、播客介绍和角色声音的自然文本到语音提示。

按风格浏览

为什么啊哈提示

一个与整个 AI 创意堆栈保持同步的库，因此您无需这样做。

01提示 GPT Image 2、Nano Banana、Midjourney、Veo、Sora、Seedance、Suno 等 - 每个都标有其编写的模型。

02图像、视频和音频集于一处。 按媒体类型过滤并直接跳至您的工艺。

03一键将完整的提示、参数包含在剪贴板上。 粘贴到任何工具或 API 中。

04编辑策划的收藏以及社区提交的内容 - 每个提示在上线之前都会经过审核。

05完整的英语、中文、日语和韩语库 — 用您的语言复制，用任何语言创建。

06免费浏览、复制和使用每个公共提示。 每个人都应该可以使用出色的提示。

很高兴知道

您需要了解的有关 AhaPrompt 以及如何充分利用该库的所有信息。
